mapper.select: SELECT public_id FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT public_id FROM posts WHERE caption = #{caption} LIMIT 1
SELECT pi.object_key FROM post_images pi INNER JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = pi.post_id WHERE p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
mapper.delete: DELETE r FROM replies r INNER JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = r.post_id WHERE p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
DELETE pi FROM post_images pi INNER JOIN posts p ON p.public_id = pi.post_id WHERE p.caption LIKE '[STG] %'
DELETE FROM posts WHERE caption LIKE '[STG] %'
DELETE FROM users WHERE email LIKE 'stg\\_seed\\_user\\_%@example.com'
